subject: feat(ui): add Refresh option to burger menu for standalone PWA
body:
In standalone PWA mode there's no browser refresh button. "Check for
updates" only checks the service worker — it doesn't reload the page
to fetch fresh station/price data. Add a "Refresh" item that calls
window.location.reload(), placed in the PWA group (web only).

Uses 'repeat' icon to differentiate from 'refresh' (Check for updates).

Tags: ui, pwa, burger-menu
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa
Semver: minor
